parameters.query: SELECT u.telegram_id, u.first_name, up.wake_up_time, up.meal_count, mp.plan_json FROM users u JOIN memberships m ON m.user_id = u.id AND m.status = 'active' AND m.expires_at > NOW() JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.id AND up.onboarding_completed = true JOIN meal_plans mp ON mp.user_id = u.id AND mp.is_active = true WHERE u.is_active = true;

parameters.text:
